integrity.description: Agent interacted with actual SeisComP tools or configuration files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using the 'scconfig' GUI, editing files in '/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/', or running 'seiscomp' CLI commands, rather than just typing text into an unrelated file.

integrity.description: Configuration dumps were generated by the system, not manually typed
integrity.visual_evidence: The files '/home/ga/scamp_config_dump.txt' and '/home/ga/scmag_config_dump.txt' should be generated via redirection (e.g., '>') from a SeisComP command, rather than manually created and typed out in a text editor to mimic a dump.

integrity.description: Agent did not just copy-paste the prompt into the dump files
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of the dump files should look like authentic SeisComP configuration formats (e.g., 'magnitudes.ML.filter = ...'), not just a copy-paste of the task description text.
